MAJOR_09.name: The Hermit
MAJOR_09.reactive_behavior: Executes localized process lockdown; shields current line cells from external modifier corruption.

MAJOR_10.name: Wheel of Fortune
MAJOR_10.reactive_behavior: Modifies active payline gear ratios, dynamically applying a random multiplier step based on loop velocity.

MAJOR_13.name: Death
MAJOR_13.reactive_behavior: Triggers complete board clear layout collapse; flushes deadlocked memory allocations to prepare next phase.

MAJOR_15.name: The Devil
MAJOR_15.reactive_behavior: Imposes strict state locking; ties adjacent values to its position to calculate steady resource draw per tick.
